Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingSession

Packages that use MarshallingSession
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3.ui
OpenAPI UI Generator
org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger.ui
Swagger UI Generator
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall
Marshalling API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal
Internal Utilities
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.objecttools
Java Object Tools

Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.

Swap API

    Field
    Description

    Default reusable unmodifiable session.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MarshallingSession
    MarshallingSession.Builder.build()
    Build the object.
    MarshallingSession
    MarshallingContext.getSession()
     
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall with parameters of type MarshallingSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BuilderSwap<T,?>
    ClassMeta.getBuilderSwap(MarshallingSession session)
    Returns the builder swap associated with this class.
    T
    ClassMeta.getExample(MarshallingSession session, JsonParserSession jpSession)
    Returns the example of this class.
    ClassMeta<?>
    ClassMeta.getSerializedClassMeta(MarshallingSession session)
    Returns the serialized (swapped) form of this class if there is an ObjectSwap associated with it.
    ObjectSwap<T,?>
    ClassMeta.getSwap(MarshallingSession session)
    Returns the ObjectSwap associated with this class that's the best match for the specified session.

  • Uses of MarshallingSession in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections that return MarshallingSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected MarshallingSession
    MarshalledList.bs()
    Returns the MarshallingSession associated with this list (lazily defaults to MarshallingContext.DEFAULT_SESSION).
    protected MarshallingSession
    MarshalledMap.bs()
    Returns the MarshallingSession associated with this map (lazily defaults to MarshallingContext.DEFAULT_SESSION).
    MarshallingSession
    MarshalledList.getMarshallingSession()
    Returns the MarshallingSession currently associated with this list.
    MarshallingSession
    MarshalledMap.getMarshallingSession()
    Returns the MarshallingSession currently associated with this map.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections with parameters of type MarshallingSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected JsonMap
    JsonMap.newMarshalledMap(MarshallingSession bs)
     
    protected MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.newMarshalledMap(MarshallingSession bs)
    Factory hook used by MarshalledMap.cast(Class) / MarshalledMap.cast(ClassMeta) when the target map type cannot be instantiated directly (e.g. when the caller asks for the Map interface).
    JsonList
    JsonList.session(MarshallingSession session)
     
    JsonMap
    JsonMap.session(MarshallingSession session)
     
    MarshalledList
    MarshalledList.session(MarshallingSession session)
    Override the default bean session used for converting POJOs.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.session(MarshallingSession session)
    Override the default bean session used for converting POJOs.
    ResolvingMarshalledMap
    ResolvingMarshalledMap.session(MarshallingSession session)
     
    JsonList
    JsonList.setBeanSession(MarshallingSession value)
     
    JsonMap
    JsonMap.setBeanSession(MarshallingSession value)
     
    MarshalledList
    MarshalledList.setBeanSession(MarshallingSession value)
    Sets the MarshallingSession currently associated with this list.
    MarshalledMap
    MarshalledMap.setBeanSession(MarshallingSession value)
    Sets the MarshallingSession currently associated with this map.

  • Uses of MarshallingSession in org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap with parameters of type MarshallingSession
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    T
    BuilderSwap.build(MarshallingSession session, B builder, ClassMeta<?> hint)
    Creates a new object from the specified builder.
    B
    BuilderSwap.create(MarshallingSession session, ClassMeta<?> hint)
    Creates a new builder object.
    ClassMeta<?>
    BuilderSwap.getBuilderClassMeta(MarshallingSession session)
    Returns the ClassMeta of the transformed class type.
    ClassMeta<?>
    ObjectSwap.getSwapClassMeta(MarshallingSession session)
    Returns the ClassMeta of the transformed class type.
    int
    ObjectSwap.match(MarshallingSession session)
    Returns a number indicating how well this swap matches the specified session.
    List<?>
    AutoListSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o)
     
    Map<?,?>
    AutoMapSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o)
     
    Number
    AutoNumberSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o)
     
    Object
    AutoObjectSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o)
     
    String
    AutoStringSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, T o)
     
    S
    FunctionalSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, T o, String template)
     
    S
    ObjectSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, T o)
    If this transform is to be used to serialize non-serializable objects, it must implement this method.
    S
    ObjectSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, T o, String template)
    Same as ObjectSwap.swap(MarshallingSession, Object), but can be used if your swap has a template associated with it.
    F
    SurrogateSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, T o)
     
    T
    AutoListSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession session, List<?> o, ClassMeta<?> hint)
     
    T
    AutoMapSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession session, Map<?,?> o, ClassMeta<?> hint)
     
    T
    AutoNumberSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession session, Number o, ClassMeta<?> hint)
     
    T
    AutoObjectSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession session, Object f, ClassMeta<?> hint)
     
    T
    AutoStringSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession session, String s, ClassMeta<?> hint)
     
    T
    FunctionalSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession session, S f, ClassMeta<?> hint, String template)
     
    T
    ObjectSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession session, S f, ClassMeta<?> hint)
    If this transform is to be used to reconstitute objects that aren't true Java beans, it must implement this method.
    T
    ObjectSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession session, S f, ClassMeta<?> hint, String template)
    Same as ObjectSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession, Object, ClassMeta), but can be used if your swap has a template associated with it.
    T
    SurrogateSwap.unswap(MarshallingSession session, F f, ClassMeta<?> hint)

    ClassFormatSwap.swap(MarshallingSession session, Class<?> o)

    InputStreamSwap.Base64.swap(MarshallingSession session, InputStream is)
    Converts the specified InputStream to a String.
    String

    Converts the specified InputStream to a String.
